title: Daniel Fickling
name: Daniel Fickling
standfirst: I’m a design leader who brings pragmatic, user-centred thinking to complex digital problems.

about.paragraph1: Across enterprise platforms, SaaS products, and consumer brands, I’ve delivered measurable lifts in KPIs, customer satisfaction, and product performance for companies including Serko, Tesco, Virgin Trains, and NatWest.
about.paragraph2: Grounded in evidence-based, user-centred design, I balance real user needs with commercial outcomes to create meaningful, scalable impact.
about.paragraph3: My lean, evidence-led approach enables teams to move quickly and iterate with purpose, progressing from early experiments to products people genuinely love.
